urdu transliteration text:
zahra ki betiyon ki ridayein utar gayiThe veils of Zahra’s daughters were snatched awayEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

english translation text: This made Imam Sajjad (a.s) old before his age

urdu transliteration text:
laashon ko rassiyon may jakad kar liye phirosaydaniya to ghar se nikalte hi mar gayi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
It was as if lifeless bodies were tied in chains,
The ladies of the Ahlulbayt (a.s.) died out of mortification as soon as they were taken out of the tents

urdu transliteration text:
jaati thi jo kabhi kabhi zahra ki qabr parjaane khuda hujoom se kaise guzar gayi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Bibi Zainab (s.a) used to seldom visit the grave of her mother,
God alone knows how she passed through the crowds of people in that state
When the strong winds of cruelty and oppression began to blow,

urdu transliteration text:
godhon se raahe shaam may gir gir ke mar gayebachon ke laashe dekh ke maayein bhi mar gayi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
All along the way to Sham children fell from the horses and died,
The mothers died from seeing their children falling to their death
O Bibi your ears are injured, where have your earrings gone?
O Oppressors! Do not take the ladies into the bazaar without their veils,
